privileged_info_summary: The astronomy_log_cleaner task uses synthetic data generated by a Python script. The task operates on a LibreOffice Calc spreadsheet containing 8 astronomy observation records from a fictional star party. All Messier catalog numbers used (M31, M42, M45, M57, M33, M13, M27, M8) are authentic and correctly map to real astronomical objects: Andromeda Galaxy, Orion Nebula, Pleiades, Ring Nebula, Triangulum Galaxy, Hercules Cluster, Dumbbell Nebula, and Lagoon Nebula respectively. The task includes a reference sheet with 8 object-to-Messier-number mappings for VLOOKUP exercises. Observations are rated by 3 observers on a 1-5 quality scale. The task is classified as medium difficulty with a 180-second timeout and 15-step limit.
